subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which hath been sent down in truth from the presence of One Who is Mighty, All-Wise. It proclaimeth: "Verily, I am the Prisoner in this mighty prison." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز حکیم ینطق بانی انا المسجون فی هذا السجن العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
